name: The Bunker Clifton Park
address: 19 Clifton Country Rd Suite 1, Clifton Park, NY 12065
about: The Bunker is an indoor golf and social lounge venue that features TrackMan simulators as its core offering. It combines golf simulation with a full-service bar and food menu, creating an environment that appeals to both serious golfers and social groups. The facility provides a realistic golf experience using technology used by PGA professionals, along with amenities like leagues, private events, and professional coaching services to cater to a wide range of customers.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to world-class TrackMan technology providing data-driven insights and realistic gameplay
Flexible bay capacity allowing up to 8 people to play together and split the cost
Professional coaching available with PGA-certified instructors and custom lesson packages
All-in-one venue combining high-tech golf simulation with a full bar and food menu for a complete experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full food menu available at Clifton Park location; light food menu at Guilderland location. Menus available online.
Full bar service available at all locations with indoor/outdoor seating options.

simulator_hardware.notes: Multiple bays equipped with TrackMan technology, the industry standard used by PGA professionals.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't explicitly state if clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own equipment for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full bar and food menu, suggesting outside food and drink may not be permitted. BYOB is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue recommends one hour per person for 18 holes, or two hours for a foursome to complete 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Bunker appears to be kid-friendly as it mentions catering to families and has a casual sports bar atmosphere.
